title: tephroseris rivularis subsp. pseudocrispa
intro: Tephroseris rivularis subsp. pseudocrispa, also known as a mountain everlasting, is a type of flowering plant native to the mountainous regions of Eastern Europe and Western Asia. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Tephroseris rivularis subsp. pseudocrispa include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and acting as an antiseptic to promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of the plant can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and are often used to treat respiratory issues, fever, and skin problems.
